purpose: Validate stored watermark before incremental SQL ingestion

validation_rules.name: stored_watermark_exists
validation_rules.description: Stored watermark must be present before incremental load starts

validation_rules.name: stored_watermark_not_empty
validation_rules.description: Stored watermark must not be null or empty

validation_rules.name: stored_watermark_type_valid
validation_rules.description: Stored watermark must match the configured watermark type

validation_rules.name: stored_watermark_not_ahead_of_source
validation_rules.description: Stored watermark must not be greater than the current source maximum watermark
